execution_release_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 explicitly states purchase execution release remains to be scheduled; sourcing review complete does not close the execution-release field
execution_release_binding.purchase_order_match: PO-NOV-042 exists and binds correct material, quantity, facility

final_answer: The execution-release field is not abstract or satisfied by operational wording. EHS-NOV-042 directly states the execution release remains to be scheduled. SRC-NOV-042 is explicitly scoped to supplier quote collection only and cannot close the execution-release boundary. The policy STD-NOV-042-P requires a closed execution release matching chemical, quantity band, facility, and PO before PO issuance. No source record supplies this closure. The execution-release field is genuinely open; it is not closed by any source text. ESCALATE verdict is deterministic and correct per gov routing lens.
open_blockers: EHS-NOV-042 purchase execution release not yet scheduled
PO issuance cannot proceed until execution release is issued and matched against PO-NOV-042 material, quantity, facility
